basics.name: Shubham Shrivastava
basics.label: Software and Product Management Professional
basics.summary: Results-driven product management professional with over 4 years of experience in software development, product lifecycle management, and strategic data analysis. Expert in crafting and executing product roadmaps, translating complex requirements into actionable features, and optimizing cross-functional team collaboration. Proven ability to leverage data insights for scalable, user-centric solutions that align with business objectives, driving significant improvements in product performance and user engagement.

education.institution: Rajiv Gandhi Proudyogiki Vishwavidyalaya, M.P., India

highlights: Led the development and launch of Clarity Compass, a stress management app for women aged 21-40.
Managed the product roadmap and oversaw its deployment to the Apple App Store and Google Play Store.
Spearheaded migrating legacy systems to SaaS platforms using Mulesoft and automation tools, improving system performance.
Synchronized over 1 million records within 15 minutes, managing extensive datasets, and ensuring real-time data availability.

work.company: Department of Financial Services, Oakland University
highlights: Directed end-to-end planning, market research, and execution of the RNL Engage software implementation.
Increasing alumni engagement by 20% through feature prioritization and roadmap execution.
Led go-to-market growth strategy for Streetingo Android application, from ideation to Google Play Store launch.
Achieving an 18% increase in daily active users for B2B and B2C Clients through AdTech integration.
Developed scalable J2EE applications and implemented REST APIs with Spring Boot.
Improved code quality using test-driven development and tools like JUnit and Mockito.
